executiveSummary: Gates Garage Door Service has built a solid foundation on the Duda platform with decent meta descriptions and a clean site structure. Your homepage targets the right keywords — garage door repair and installation in Chico — and the site loads quickly. That puts you ahead of some competitors in the area.

But there are gaps holding you back from ranking higher. The biggest issue: your site only has WebSite schema — no LocalBusiness schema at all. That means Google has no structured data about your address, phone number, service area, or business hours. There's no blog content to capture long-tail search queries, and there are duplicate content blocks across multiple pages that can confuse search engines. Your secondary domain gatesgaragedoor.com appears to be dead or redirecting inconsistently.

Garage door services are emergency-driven searches — when a door breaks, homeowners call the first company they find. With the right technical SEO fixes and content strategy, Gates Garage Door Service can capture significantly more of those high-intent local searches in the Chico market.

assessment.title: Website Analysis — gatesgaragedoorservice.com
points: Built on Duda platform with responsive design.
Homepage meta description targets relevant keywords (garage door repair, installation, Chico).
Site loads quickly — Duda's built-in CDN handles performance well.
Clean navigation structure with clear service categories.
Contact information visible in header area.

assessment.title: Critical SEO Gaps
points: Only WebSite schema — no LocalBusiness schema. Google has zero structured data about your business.
No blog or content pages — missing all long-tail keyword opportunities.
Duplicate content blocks across service pages — can trigger Google's duplicate content filters.
Secondary domain gatesgaragedoor.com is dead or inconsistently redirecting.
No FAQ schema for common garage door questions.
No review or aggregate rating schema despite likely having customer reviews.
Limited internal linking between service pages.

assessment.title: Competitive Landscape
points: Chico garage door market has several established competitors including The Door Company (4 locations).
Most competitors also lack proper schema — early implementation gives first-mover advantage.
Blog content is virtually nonexistent across Chico garage door companies — huge opportunity.
Google Business Profile optimization is the fastest path to local pack visibility.
Emergency-driven searches favor companies with strong local SEO signals.

findings.finding: Only WebSite schema — no LocalBusiness, no Service schema
Zero blog posts or educational content pages
Content blocks repeated across multiple service pages
No AggregateRating or Review schema implemented
No FAQ structured data for common questions
Duda platform delivers fast load times via CDN

strategy.title: Phase 1: Technical Foundation (Months 1-2)
actions: Implement full LocalBusiness schema with complete NAP data.
Add Service schema for each garage door service offered.
Resolve duplicate content across service pages with unique copy.
Fix or properly redirect gatesgaragedoor.com domain.
Add FAQ schema for top garage door questions.
Set up Google Search Console and verify ownership.

strategy.title: Phase 2: Content & Local SEO (Months 3-5)
actions: Launch blog with 4 posts per month targeting garage door keywords.
Create unique service area pages for surrounding cities (Paradise, Oroville, etc.).
Optimize Google Business Profile with photos, posts, and Q&A.
Build citation consistency across home service directories.
Internal linking strategy connecting services, blog, and area pages.

strategy.title: Phase 3: Growth & Dominance (Months 6-12)
actions: Google Ads targeting emergency garage door keywords.
Before/after project galleries with full image SEO.
Video content for YouTube and website embedding.
Monthly competitive analysis and ranking reports.
Seasonal content campaigns (winter prep, spring maintenance).

pricingIntro: Gates Garage Door Service has a clean, fast website with decent meta descriptions — that's a better starting point than most. The missing LocalBusiness schema, duplicate content, and lack of blog content are all fixable issues that would significantly improve your visibility in Chico-area searches. These are standard Duda platform optimizations that can be implemented quickly.
